mapper.sql: id, mch_id, promise_amt, status, pay_type, is_pass, add_date
mapper.select: select a.id aid,a.promise_amt,a.add_date,a.refused_date,a.refused_why,a.status,a.is_pass,b.*,cast(c.user_name as char ) userName from lkt_promise_sh a left join lkt_mch b on a.mch_id = b.id left join lkt_user c on c.user_id = b.user_id WHERE 1=1 and a.mch_id = #{mch_id} and b.store_id = #{storeId} and (b.user_id = #{title} or b.name = #{title}) order by a.add_date desc LIMIT #{pageStart},#{pageEnd}

select a.promise_amt,a.add_date,a.refused_date,a.refused_why,a.status,a.is_pass,b.* from lkt_promise_sh a left join lkt_mch b on a.mch_id = b.id WHERE 1=1 and a.mch_id = #{mch_id} and (b.user_id = #{title} or b.name = #{title}) and a.refused_why is not null LIMIT #{pageStart},#{pageEnd}

select a.promise_amt,a.add_date,a.refused_date,a.refused_why,a.status,a.is_pass,b.* from lkt_promise_sh a left join lkt_mch b on a.mch_id = b.id WHERE a.id = (select max(a.id) from lkt_promise_sh) and a.mch_id = #{mch_id} and (b.user_id = #{title} or b.name = #{title}) LIMIT #{pageStart},#{pageEnd}

SELECT count(distinct a.id) from lkt_promise_sh a left join lkt_mch b on a.mch_id = b.id WHERE 1=1 and a.mch_id = #{mch_id} and b.store_id = #{storeId} and (b.user_id = #{title} or b.name = #{title}) order by a.add_date desc
